matchingDescription: Antivirus and internet security software, malware protection, ransomware defence, cybersecurity for UK consumers

variants.text: Norton 360 provides award-winning antivirus, a no-log VPN, and dark web monitoring — comprehensive protection for your devices and personal data.
Protect your files from ransomware with Norton 360's advanced threat detection — real-time protection that blocks attacks before they can encrypt your data.
Protect every device in your home with Norton 360 — one subscription covers PCs, Macs, smartphones, and tablets with antivirus and a built-in VPN.
Norton 360 monitors the dark web for your personal information and alerts you if your data appears in a breach — protection beyond just your device.
Norton's antivirus runs quietly in the background with minimal impact on system performance — protection that doesn't slow you down.
